Longchamp Le Pliage 70th Anniversary Limited Edition Backpack

Extremely popular, practical, versatile, and durable—this backpack is a must-have for modern young women’s daily outings. The classic, simple design never goes out of style. Even if you haven’t bought one before, you’ve surely seen many carrying it year after year!

Wear it as a backpack or carry it by hand—freedom to style as you wish for ultimate comfort on the go. It can also hold small charms or be customized with DIY graffiti, instantly becoming a unique creative bag!

Why so loved? Many are indifferent before use but can’t live without it afterward. The Longchamp bag perfectly meets the dual needs of lightweight travel and practicality. It folds compactly into a small square, taking up minimal space, yet expands to hold all your essentials. Easy to carry out with one hand and return fully loaded with groceries, books, or other items. Ideal for students and office workers alike! Also perfect for kids—lightweight with no burden or pressure. Great as a mom bag too, with a durable interior. There’s simply no reason not to fall for it!

Made from thickened, waterproof polyamide canvas with an inner coating—lightweight, durable, functional, and stylish. It represents American spirit and is a global bestseller. The fabric is soft yet tough, with a subtle luxury sheen and silky smooth texture. Highly tear-resistant, wear-resistant, and water-resistant. Simply put, one Longchamp bag can last you a lifetime.

Hardware is custom-made with exquisite detail on the iconic horse logo—from the horse’s outline to the groom’s posture, all clear and layered. Electroplated and polished for a refined, natural luster that exudes quiet elegance and luxury.

Colors: Pure White, Hawthorn White, Dusty Pink, Pure Black, Navy Blue, Nordic Blue, Gunmetal Gray, Beige
